summary: Comprehensive testing of PRO features for Budeživo.cz cultural booking system completed. All backend APIs passed (13/13 tests). All frontend PRO features verified working: CSV export, school selection with checkboxes, mass propagation modal, PRO settings with email templates, URL generator for programs, extended booking edit (date/time/contact).

minor.issue: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/settings/pro - returns PRO settings with is_pro=true for standard plan
Backend: PUT /api/settings/pro - updates email templates
Backend: GET /api/schools/export-csv - returns CSV file with school data
Backend: POST /api/schools/send-propagation - sends propagation to selected schools (MOCKED email)
Backend: GET /api/programs/{id}/external-url - returns URL, embed code, program name
Backend: PUT /api/bookings/{id} - admin can update date field
Backend: PUT /api/bookings/{id} - admin can update time_block field
Backend: PUT /api/bookings/{id} - admin can update contact_email field
Backend: PUT /api/bookings/{id} - admin can update contact_phone field
Backend: PUT /api/bookings/{id} - admin can update contact_name field
Backend: PUT /api/bookings/{id} - admin can update multiple fields at once
Frontend: Schools page - Export CSV button visible (PRO)
Frontend: Schools page - Select all schools checkbox working
Frontend: Schools page - Individual school selection with checkboxes
Frontend: Schools page - 'Rozeslat propagaci (N)' button shows selected count
Frontend: Settings - PRO funkce section visible with PRO badge
Frontend: Settings PRO - CSV export toggle switch
Frontend: Settings PRO - Hromadná propagace toggle switch
Frontend: Settings PRO - Email subject template input with {program_name} placeholder
Frontend: Settings PRO - Email body textarea with multiple placeholders
Frontend: Programs - Three dots menu with 'Generovat URL' option
Frontend: Programs - URL generator modal with URL, copy button, embed code, preview button
Frontend: Bookings - Edit datetime button visible for admin
Frontend: Bookings - Date input (date picker) in edit mode
Frontend: Bookings - Time block input in edit mode
Frontend: Bookings - Save datetime button
Frontend: Bookings - Edit contact button visible for admin
Frontend: Bookings - Kontaktní údaje section shows name, email (mailto link), phone (tel link)
critical_code_review_comments: All PRO features correctly gated by plan status (standard/premium)
Email sending in send_propagation is MOCKED - only logs, does not send real emails
CSV export generates proper semicolon-separated CSV with Czech headers
External URL generator creates proper booking URLs with institution and program IDs
BookingUpdate model correctly extended with date, time_block, contact_* fields
Role-based access control properly restricts field updates (admin/spravce/edukator can edit date/time/contact)
test_credentials: demo@budezivo.cz / demo123 (admin role, standard plan - PRO enabled)
seed_data_creation: 5 schools exist with booking counts. 3 programs exist (Komentovaná prohlídka, Výtvarná dílna, Noční prohlídka). 2 bookings with updated contact data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PRO features fully implemented and tested. Demo account has standard plan (PRO). Schools page shows Export CSV and propagation buttons. Settings has PRO funkce section with email templates. Programs have URL generator in menu. Bookings detail has edit buttons for datetime and contact. Email sending is MOCKED - verify in backend logs.
